commonProblems.h2: Honda FR-V Engine Problems - What It Costs to Fix & When Replacement Makes Sense
commonProblems.h3: The Honda FR-V's 2.2L i-CTDi diesel and 1.7/1.8/2.0L petrol engines each have known failure patterns that drive replacement demand. Every rebuilt engine supplied through EngineMarket includes upgraded internal components designed to address the original failure point - plus a minimum 12‑month unlimited mileage warranty. Use this section to understand your options and compare quotes.

problems.h4: N22A1 Injector Failure - Why Honda FR-V 2.2 i-CTDi Engines Fail
problems.affectedModels: Honda FR-V SE, Executive, Sport 2.2 i-CTDi (2004-2009, N22A1)
problems.rootCause: High-pressure common-rail injectors wear internally, causing misfires, rough running and excessive smoke.

repairOptions.whatItInvolves: Remove, bench-test and clean injectors; replace seals
repairOptions.longevity: Temporary fix; may delay replacement 6-12 months

repairOptions.whatItInvolves: Replace 1-2 faulty injectors with reconditioned units
repairOptions.longevity: Viable if only 1-2 injectors failed; others may follow

repairOptions.whatItInvolves: Supply & fit rebuilt N22A1 with upgraded injectors, bench-tested
repairOptions.longevity: Best value when multiple injectors failed or engine damaged

problems.recommendation: If your FR-V has over 80k miles and shows multiple injector fault codes, a rebuilt engine often costs less than replacing all four injectors at main dealer prices. We recommend comparing rebuilt N22A1 quotes before committing to injector repairs.
problems.cta: Compare rebuilt N22A1 engine prices for your Honda FR-V

problems.h4: N22A1 DPF Blockage - When Regeneration Fails on Honda FR-V Diesel
problems.affectedModels: Honda FR-V SE, Executive, Sport 2.2 i-CTDi (2004-2009, N22A1)
problems.rootCause: Short-journey driving prevents active DPF regeneration; soot accumulates until back-pressure damages the turbo or engine.

repairOptions.whatItInvolves: Diagnostic tool triggers active DPF burn-off cycle
repairOptions.longevity: Only works if DPF not physically blocked; preventative

repairOptions.whatItInvolves: Off-vehicle chemical clean or replace DPF unit
repairOptions.longevity: Viable if engine not damaged; cleaning may not last

repairOptions.whatItInvolves: Supply & fit rebuilt N22A1; DPF deleted or replaced if required
repairOptions.longevity: Best when DPF blockage caused turbo or engine damage

problems.recommendation: If your FR-V's DPF warning light has been on for weeks and performance is reduced, the blockage may have already caused secondary damage. Get a rebuilt engine quote before paying for expensive DPF replacement.
problems.cta: Get quotes for Honda FR-V 2.2 i-CTDi replacement engines

problems.h4: R18A1 Timing Chain Stretch - Honda FR-V 1.8 i-VTEC Rattle
problems.affectedModels: Honda FR-V SE, Executive, Sport 1.8 i-VTEC (2007-2009, R18A1)
problems.rootCause: Timing chain tensioner wear allows chain slack; rattling on cold start indicates stretch that can jump timing and destroy the engine.

repairOptions.whatItInvolves: Replace chain, tensioner, guides before failure occurs
repairOptions.longevity: Best value if caught early; no engine damage yet

repairOptions.whatItInvolves: Supply & fit rebuilt R18A1 with upgraded timing components
repairOptions.longevity: Required if chain jumped and valves/pistons damaged

problems.recommendation: If your 1.8L FR-V rattles on cold start but still runs, a preventative timing chain kit from a specialist is far cheaper than engine replacement. If the engine has already failed, compare rebuilt R18A1 quotes.
problems.cta: Compare rebuilt R18A1 engine prices for your Honda FR-V

problems.h4: D17A Head Gasket Failure - Honda FR-V 1.7 i-DSI Overheating
problems.affectedModels: Honda FR-V SE, Executive 1.7 i-DSI (2004-2006, D17A)
problems.rootCause: Cylinder head warping or gasket degradation allows coolant into cylinders; white smoke and mayonnaise under oil cap are key signs.

repairOptions.whatItInvolves: Remove cylinder head, replace gasket, machine head if warped
repairOptions.longevity: Viable if block not cracked; check for warping first

repairOptions.whatItInvolves: Supply & fit rebuilt D17A with upgraded gasket and components
repairOptions.longevity: Best when block damaged or head not salvageable

problems.recommendation: On a 1.7L FR-V worth under £2,000, a rebuilt engine often costs similar to a head gasket job but comes with warranty and upgraded components. Get both quotes before deciding.
problems.cta: Get quotes for Honda FR-V 1.7 i-DSI engine replacement

problems.h4: K20A Oil Consumption - Honda FR-V 2.0 i-VTEC Burning Oil
problems.affectedModels: Honda FR-V SE, Executive, Sport 2.0 i-VTEC (2004-2006, K20A)
problems.rootCause: Piston ring wear allows oil into combustion chamber; blue smoke on acceleration and frequent top-ups signal the issue.

repairOptions.whatItInvolves: Replace PCV valve, valve stem seals; may reduce oil use
repairOptions.longevity: Temporary; does not fix worn piston rings

repairOptions.whatItInvolves: Supply & fit rebuilt K20A with upgraded piston rings
repairOptions.longevity: Only permanent solution for high oil consumption

problems.recommendation: If your 2.0L FR-V uses over 1L oil per 1,000 miles, piston rings are likely worn. A rebuilt K20A with upgraded rings is more cost-effective than repeated top-ups and eventual engine failure.
problems.cta: Compare rebuilt K20A engine prices for your Honda FR-V

finalCta.h4: Don't Let Engine Failure Write Off Your Honda FR-V
finalCta.paragraph: The Honda FR-V's versatile 3+3 seating makes it worth saving, but engine failures can seem expensive. EngineMarket makes it simple to compare prices from trusted UK Honda FR-V specialists for rebuilt, reconditioned and used engines. Every unit includes upgraded components addressing the original failure point, bench testing, and a minimum 12‑month unlimited mileage warranty. Compare quotes today and get your FR-V back on the road without the main dealer premium.
finalCta.buttonText: Compare Honda FR-V Engine Replacement Prices Now →
finalCta.disclaimer: All prices are indicative UK market ranges based on historical quote data and repair requests from our network of engine specialists. Dealer pricing is estimated based on published main dealer labour rates and genuine OEM parts pricing. Specialist pricing reflects actual quote data from EngineMarket's UK network. Actual costs vary depending on damage severity, vehicle condition, variant, and workshop location within the UK. Use our free comparison tool to get tailored quotes for your specific Honda FR-V and engine code. Every engine supplied through EngineMarket carries a minimum 12‑month unlimited mileage warranty - always confirm exact terms with your chosen supplier.

engineSizes.h2: Honda FR-V Engines by Size - Find the Right Displacement for Your Variant
engineSizes.intro: Every displacement fitted to the Honda FR-V is listed with compatible engine codes, production years and common failure notes to help you identify the right replacement.

items.title: Honda FR-V 2.2L Diesel Engines
items.description: The 2.2L i-CTDi diesel powered all FR-V diesel variants from 2004-2009, offering strong low-end torque for the heavy 6-seat MPV. Shared with the Accord and CR-V, the N22A1 is the most common replacement engine for FR-V owners.
items.cta: Get quotes for Honda FR-V 2.2L diesel engines

items.title: Honda FR-V 1.7L Petrol Engines
items.description: The entry-level 1.7L i-DSI petrol engine featured dual sequential ignition for efficiency. Fitted to pre-facelift FR-V SE and Executive trims, the D17A is known for head gasket issues at higher mileage.
items.cta: Compare Honda FR-V 1.7L petrol engine prices

items.title: Honda FR-V 1.8L Petrol Engines
items.description: Introduced with the 2007 facelift, the 1.8L i-VTEC replaced the 1.7L and 2.0L petrol units. The R18A1 offers improved fuel economy but timing chain stretch is a known concern for higher-mileage examples.
items.cta: Compare Honda FR-V 1.8L petrol engine prices

items.title: Honda FR-V 2.0L Petrol Engines
items.description: The pre-facelift flagship petrol engine, the 2.0L i-VTEC K20A delivered strong performance for the FR-V. Oil consumption from piston ring wear is the most common reason owners seek replacement units. Not sure which engine size your Honda FR-V needs? Enter your registration number above - we'll identify the exact displacement, engine code and compatible replacement options instantly. All engines supplied through EngineMarket include a minimum 12‑month unlimited mileage warranty from UK Honda FR-V specialists.

engineYears.h2: Honda FR-V Engines by Year - What Was Fitted & When
engineYears.intro: This timeline covers all major engine changes across the Honda FR-V's 2004-2009 production run, organised so owners can quickly identify their engine and compare rebuilt engine prices from UK specialists.

years.description: The original FR-V launched with three distinct petrol engines and the shared N22A1 diesel, establishing the 3+3 seating MPV formula.
keyChanges: FR-V introduced to UK market with unique 3+3 seating layout
SE and Executive trim levels available across all engines
knownFor: D17A head gasket failures common above 80k miles
K20A oil consumption issues on higher-mileage examples
N22A1 injectors fail between 60k-100k miles on short journeys
years.cta: Get quotes for 2004-2006 Honda FR-V replacement engines
years.ticker: Honda FR-V 1.7 head gasket • Honda FR-V 2.0 oil consumption • Honda FR-V diesel injector failure

years.description: The 2007 facelift simplified the petrol range to a single 1.8L i-VTEC unit while retaining the proven 2.2L diesel across all trims.
keyChanges: Petrol range consolidated to single 1.8L R18A1 i-VTEC engine
Exterior refresh with new bumpers, lights and grille
Interior trim updates and improved equipment levels
N22A1 diesel received minor ECU refinements (N22A2 late production)
knownFor: R18A1 timing chain stretch risk between 70k-110k miles
N22A1 DPF blockage on predominantly short-journey use
Facelift models command slightly higher used values
Final year 2009 examples most sought by FR-V enthusiasts
years.cta: Get quotes for 2007-2009 Honda FR-V replacement engines
years.ticker: Honda FR-V 1.8 timing chain • Honda FR-V diesel DPF blockage • Honda FR-V 2009 engine replacement

engineYears.closing: Not sure which year your Honda FR-V was built? Enter your registration number and we'll identify the exact engine, model year, and compatible replacement options instantly - all backed by a minimum 12‑month warranty from UK Honda FR-V specialists.

faq.h2: Honda FR-V Engine Replacement - Frequently Asked Questions

items.question: How much does a Honda FR-V engine replacement cost UK?
items.answer: A rebuilt Honda FR-V engine typically costs £900-£2,900 supply-only depending on engine code and variant. Diesel N22A1 units are at the higher end due to complexity, while petrol D17A/R18A1 are more affordable.
keyPoints: N22A1 diesel rebuilt: £1,200-£2,900 typical range
R18A1 petrol rebuilt: £1,000-£2,400 typical range
D17A/K20A petrol rebuilt: £900-£2,200 typical range
Supply & fit labour adds £400-£900 depending on garage
items.cta: Compare Honda FR-V engine replacement prices from UK specialists

items.question: What is the most reliable Honda FR-V engine?
items.answer: The pre-facelift 2.0L K20A petrol is generally considered the most robust Honda FR-V engine when properly maintained, though all variants have known failure points that drive replacement enquiries.
keyPoints: K20A 2.0L petrol has strong long-term reliability record
R18A1 1.8L facelift petrol efficient but timing chain concerns
N22A1 diesel powerful but injector/DPF failures common
Regular servicing critical for any FR-V engine longevity
items.cta: Get quotes for Honda FR-V K20A engine replacement

items.question: What causes Honda FR-V diesel injector failure?
items.answer: High-pressure common-rail injectors on the N22A1 wear internally from fuel contamination or high mileage, causing misfires, rough running and excessive smoke that often warrant engine replacement.
keyPoints: Injector failure typically occurs 60k-100k miles
Short-journey driving accelerates injector wear
Replacing all four injectors can cost more than rebuilt engine
Rebuilt N22A1 includes upgraded injectors as standard
items.cta: Compare rebuilt N22A1 engine prices for your Honda FR-V

items.question: Is it worth replacing the engine in a Honda FR-V?
items.answer: Yes, if your FR-V is in good body/chassis condition and has low mileage elsewhere. A rebuilt engine costing £1,000-£2,900 can extend life by 50k+ miles versus scrapping a £1,500-£3,000 vehicle.
keyPoints: FR-V values £1,500-£3,000 depending on trim and condition
Rebuilt engine cost often less than vehicle scrap value loss
Unique 3+3 seating makes FR-V hard to replace practically
12-month warranty on rebuilt engines reduces risk
items.cta: Find out if your Honda FR-V is worth engine replacement

items.question: What is the difference between Honda FR-V 1.7 and 1.8 engines?
items.answer: The 1.7L D17A (2004-2006) used i-DSI twin-spark technology for efficiency, while the 1.8L R18A1 (2007-2009) is a simpler i-VTEC unit; they are not interchangeable without major modifications.
keyPoints: D17A: 125hp, twin-spark, timing belt, head gasket issues
R18A1: 140hp, i-VTEC, timing chain, chain stretch risk
Different engine mounts, ECUs and ancillaries prevent direct swap
Always match replacement engine code to your FR-V's original
items.cta: Get quotes for your exact Honda FR-V engine code

items.question: How long does a Honda FR-V engine last?
items.answer: With proper servicing, Honda FR-V engines can reach 150,000-200,000 miles, but known failure points like injectors (diesel) or timing components (petrol) often require attention before that milestone.
keyPoints: N22A1 diesel: injector/DPF issues typically 60k-100k miles
R18A1 petrol: timing chain stretch risk 70k-110k miles
D17A petrol: head gasket failures common 80k+ miles
Full service history significantly extends engine life
items.cta: Compare Honda FR-V engine options for high-mileage vehicles

items.question: Can I replace my Honda FR-V engine myself?
items.answer: While technically possible for experienced mechanics, the FR-V's tight engine bay and 3+3 seating layout make DIY engine replacement challenging; professional supply & fit is recommended for warranty protection.
keyPoints: FR-V engine removal requires specialist lifting equipment
Tight clearances around rear seats complicate access
Professional fitting ensures warranty remains valid
Supply-only option available if you have workshop facilities
items.cta: Find Honda FR-V engine supply & fit deals near you

items.question: Do I need to tell DVLA about a Honda FR-V engine change?
items.answer: Yes, you must update the V5C logbook with the new engine number if it differs from the original, though the engine code and fuel type remaining the same means no VED or insurance changes are typically required.
keyPoints: DVLA requires notification of engine number change only
No VED band change if fuel type and CO2 emissions unchanged
Inform your insurer of engine replacement for policy accuracy
Keep rebuild documentation for future sale transparency
items.cta: Get quotes for Honda FR-V engine replacement with DVLA guidance

items.question: What warranty comes with a rebuilt Honda FR-V engine?
items.answer: All rebuilt Honda FR-V engines supplied through EngineMarket include a minimum 12-month unlimited mileage warranty covering parts and labour for manufacturing defects, with some specialists offering extended terms.
keyPoints: Minimum 12-month unlimited mileage warranty standard
Warranty covers parts and labour for manufacturing defects
Some suppliers offer 24-month options at extra cost
Always confirm exact terms with your chosen supplier before ordering
items.cta: Compare Honda FR-V engine warranty terms from UK specialists

items.question: How quickly can I get a Honda FR-V replacement engine?
items.answer: Most rebuilt Honda FR-V engines are available for dispatch within 3-7 working days from UK specialists, with supply & fit appointments typically bookable within 1-2 weeks depending on garage availability.
keyPoints: Rebuilt engines usually dispatched 3-7 working days after order
Used engines may be available same-day from breakers
Supply & fit garage appointments vary by region and demand
Enter your registration for real-time availability and quotes
items.cta: Check live Honda FR-V engine availability and delivery times
